acceptance.current_state: Four GLB weapon slots load through weaponAssets and first-person createGunModel/rebuildGuns path.
acceptance.target_realism_level: Game-ready hard-surface GLB weapons with visible silhouette, optic/detail geometry, muzzle anchor, and PBR-style material factors.
acceptance.generation_acquisition_route: Local Blender weapon candidates and selected GROZA GLB.
acceptance.cleanup_route: Blender export to GLB, Three parser inventory, first/third/weapons CDP evidence.
acceptance.notes: Accepted by GLB/header/parser reports, CDP screenshot reports with imageStats, and verified artifact hashes.

acceptance.current_state: Shared weapon GLB path is used by player third-person, NPC mount, world loot, and first-person contexts.
acceptance.target_realism_level: Same weapon assets visible across character/world contexts without procedural fallback in evidence.
acceptance.generation_acquisition_route: Shared GLB registry with per-context transforms.
acceptance.cleanup_route: Runtime probe checks assetSource for viewGun, thirdGun, weapon showcase.
acceptance.notes: Accepted by GLB/header/parser reports, CDP screenshot reports with imageStats, and verified artifact hashes.

acceptance.current_state: Player body uses final GLB tactical overlay and keeps original collider/hit logic separate.
